name: stitch-ui
description: A portable Codex plugin and Claude/Codex skill for turning Google Stitch ideas into polished frontend pages.

interface.shortDescription: Build polished UI from Stitch concepts
interface.longDescription: Turns Google Stitch ideas, screenshots, and exports into polished frontend pages with reusable prompt recipes and scene-based guidance.
defaultPrompt: Use $stitch-ui to turn a Stitch screenshot into a polished page.
Use $stitch-ui to rebuild this UI with shadcn/ui.
Use $stitch-ui to make this landing page feel premium.
